vulnerabilities.description: Response headers reveal server and PHP versions (Apache/2.4.66 (Debian), X-Powered-By: PHP/8.3.30).
Publicly accessible WordPress readme reveals the CMS installation.
Unauthenticated WordPress REST API exposes user data; reveals user 'admin' (id 1).
XML-RPC is enabled; historically allows pingback SSRF and facilitates credential brute force via system.multicall.
WordPress REST API root is accessible without authentication, exposing namespaces and detailed route metadata.
